text: "The system shall provide an interface for the user to input a Master Password during the database creation process."
"The system shall permit the entry of Master Passwords exceeding 100 characters in length."
"The system shall require the user to retype the Master Password in a confirmation field before finalizing the database."
"The system shall display a 'file not found' error message if the user selects a non-existent database file path."
"The system shall display an 'invalid/wrong key' error message if the Master Password does not match the database header."
"The system shall prompt the user to save changes if a database is closed with unsaved modifications."
"The system shall generate a unique 128-bit initialization vector for every database save operation."
"The system shall encrypt all stored passwords in process memory using the ARC4 algorithm with a 12-byte key."
"The system shall clear all data from the Windows clipboard exactly 10 seconds after a user copy operation."
"The system must utilize the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) with a 256-bit key size for file encryption."
"The system must utilize the Twofish encryption algorithm with a 128-bit block size as a secondary cipher option."
"The system shall employ the SHA-256 hash algorithm to transform the Master Password into a 256-bit key."
"The system shall disable the 'Add Subgroup' command unless a primary group is currently selected in the sidebar."
"The system shall prepend the string '' to the title field of all entries generated via the TAN Wizard."
"The system shall invalidate a TAN entry immediately after it is successfully utilized for an authentication event."
"The system shall provide a Global Hot Key (Ctrl+Alt+K) to restore the application window to the foreground."
"The system shall simulate a keyboard sequence of {USERNAME}{TAB}{PASSWORD}{ENTER} by default during Auto-Type."
"The system shall limit Auto-Type sequences defined in the notes field to a single line of 59 characters."
"The system shall provide a 'Repair' utility within the Tools menu to restore databases with corrupted headers."
"The system must maintain compatibility with 32-bit Microsoft Windows (95, 98, NT, 2000, XP) architectures."
"The system shall permit the importation of data from CSV, XML, Code Wallet, and Password Safe file formats."
"The system shall generate random passwords based on user-defined character sets, patterns, or specific complexity rules."
"The system shall lock the workspace and require Master Key re-entry whenever the application window is minimized."
"The system shall prevent the saving of an entry if the 'Password' and 'Repeat Password' fields are not identical."
"The system must operate as a standalone executable from removable USB storage without registry modifications."
"The system shall allow the user to select specific fields, including Title and URL, for inclusion in a printed report."
"The system shall display all entries containing a character sequence match across all searchable fields in the database."
"The system shall store all configuration settings in a local file rather than the host machine's system registry."
